review_title: All-in-one platform with generous free to use and prices, but overwhelming complexity noise
description: Google Cloud was always reliable, has everything I need for my business projects and products, and I love experimenting with their tools, especially testing early access features, because it makes it so much easier later to implement in real production!
author: Arnes O.
pros: The availability of various solutions, tools, software, especially in the artificial intelligence field. I also really value their many programs via which you can get access to free credits and tools, as well as their general generous free use offers in combination with really acceptable prices for pay-as-you-go.
cons: The complexity and overwhelming bombarding of users immediately with dozens of links and offers and promotions and whatever, which in the end could all be so much better organized. What I mostly need the tools and services for is actually to automate, save time and effort, etc., but instead, what I get is losing time and effort and energy on researching and overthinking.

review_title: Happy to Be an innovator
description: Google Cloud is the best, and I love the platform and using all the different parts and tools of it,
author: Samer A.
pros: Google Cloud is the best service in this field, covering all the functions possible, with unparalleled ease of use, and the best part is the educational platform, the labs and free credits I am using to learn, and receiving more for free every period of time. And I am happy to introduce myself as a Google Cloud Innovator to you.
cons: I am happy with the Google Cloud service and can not find a flaw, and I constantly find new, exciting things that I did not know about.

review_title: Great if you stick to the free cloud
description: It's great to wb able to move all your info from one device to another and and it keeps it safe if you don't miss a payment
author: Susanne F.
pros: I love the fact That no matter what happens to your device your data is safe as long as you back it up beforehand and that you can access your data anytime
cons: I hate that if you have to buy more storage you have to continuously pay monthly to keep your data and if you don't pay it it you lose a lot of your data

review_title: Reliable Cloud Offering with Cost Caveats
description: I've relied on GCP as a formidable tool in my tool bag for at least the last 5 years and often pitch it to clients just getting into cloud. It's been incredibly reliable and does well at maintaining parity with out cloud solutions...despite the occasional billing snafu!
author: Ozzie B.
pros: The platform as a whole really shines, but I really did enjoy Compute Engine 100% because of how simple it was to scale apps effortlessly. I also enjoy how easy Kubernetes Engine made deploying containers and scaling up existing deployments. There's so many knobs and buttons the customization options are limitless. I was really impressed the first time I set up a client in GPC that had stringent security requirements. I was able to adjust VPC networks and IAM settings to match the requirements without breaking into the documentation. Mobile access is available and handy for keeping an eye on resources from anywhere.
cons: The biggest downside (and this isn't a GPC issue so much as a cloud issue) is the various fees that seem to find their way onto an invoice without much explanation, I'm looking at you egress fees. The second dislike was how sometimes it was difficult to get support right away, sometimes at slow times you can wait a little while before an agent becomes available which can slowdown time to resolution.

review_title: Google Cloud Share
description: Data management and giving access is great. Great features extending variety for uses as per the needs. File management is easy and quick. Creating folder and access for separate database for certain group of individuals is reliable.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Free of cost cloud which is connivent and value for money. Easy to use if you do not have gmail as your main account.
cons: Customized options only available if you pay for it. Customer support is not quiet fast as compare to other cloud sharing apps.

review_title: easy to set up and navigate, included data package is too small
description: I like that it's quite easy to navigate, you don't get lost in the depth of an unnecessary complex interface
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's ease to set up , ease to use , and works most of the time. File management and sharing is straightforward
cons: I find the cost is too high, the included data should be more and packages should be offered in more suitable increments. Uploads feels slower (on the same connection, compared to others ).

review_title: Google cloud review
description: Google cloud is fast and effecient for analysis heavy project and AI driven features and i think pricing should be lesser
author: Priyanka B.
pros: Google cloud is fast and reliable, as a Software developer Firebase is very useful and most used feature.
cons: For me when I open the google cloud there are many features and I am not very clear which one to choose

review_title: Working with Google is a treat.
author: Craig T.
pros: Google Cloud is an invaluable resource for our company as we continue to grow, the dependability of the service and the cost is great.
cons: Another Google platform to master is not such a bad thing, I think, improvements on the GUI would be welcome to make life easier.

review_title: Review of Google Cloud
description: Overall, my experience with Google Cloud has been solid. It’s a powerful platform that does what it’s supposed to do, but there’s definitely a learning curve at the beginning. Once you get the hang of it, it becomes a really reliable tool.
author: Matthew M.
pros: Strong performance and reliability Everything runs fast and smooth. I haven’t really run into downtime issues, which gives peace of mind. Great integration with other Google tools If you’re already using Google Workspace, Gmail, or Google Analytics, everything connects pretty seamlessly.
cons: Steep learning curve Not beginner-friendly. If you’re new, it can feel overwhelming trying to figure everything out.

review_title: My Take on a Powerful but Complex Platform
description: Overall it has been a good fit for us, but I wouldn't recommend it to anyone without someone technical on their team to help manage it.
author: Hallye N.
pros: I really like Google Cloud for its AI and data tools. BigQuery and Vertex AI make handling large amounts of data much easier, and the speed and reliability have been great. Pricing is also more reasonable compared to other cloud platforms we looked at.
cons: What I don't love is how hard it is to get started. Setting up permissions is confusing, support is tough to reach unless you pay extra, and the billing can catch you off guard. The interface also changes too often, which gets frustrating.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Reliable for data hosting
description: My overall experience with Google Cloud has been pretty good, mostly positive but with some frustrations along the way. it is reliable and fast once setup. Good thing is I can access my data from any device.
author: Junaid E.
pros: It works well. I use it for storage and it runs without any issue. Never had issue with speed or downtime. It connects easily with other Google products like OneDrive. I found this cheaper compare to other cloud storage options.
cons: The screen and menus are hard at start. Too many options and it is sometimes not clear where things are. I got lost few times setting up permissions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Powerful data analytics and AI
description: Similar to other major cloud providers, the value for money depends on resources used. Features such as AI and analytics are leading the pack
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Powerful software connections between end user interface and enterprise level products. Industry leading AI and data analytics among cloud providers
cons: Minor bugs and issues, as well as customer support with the somewhat steep learning curve found with a lot of major cloud providers.

review_title: Reliable, scalable and cutting edge technologies which are easy to integrate
description: Great service all round and an ever expanding array of new tools and offerings that are cutting edge & easy to setup & integrate with.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Reliability and quick to get up and running. Great uptime and highly configurable. We are using the Custom Search Engine and Google JSON Search API along with Gemini model inferencing.
cons: Billing and configuration screens can be hard to find - navigation is confusing at the best of times.

review_title: Good cloud service.
description: Overall my experience with Google Cloud is good. It does what I expect from a service like this. It's nothing special, in my opinion, but I never had any kind of trouble with it.
author: Osvaldo B.
pros: Google Cloud is a reliable data storage service. I use it at work for some time, and I found it easy and simple to customize, with good features too. I can access the files from every device, even mobile. The customer support is ready to answer, and in general, the software works pretty well. With few money per month I can buy storage space for the files I need to conserve.
cons: No differences between this service and many others the market offers. Nothing new and nothing special. It's good, but from Google I expect some innovation more.

review_title: Google Cloud; Intelligent, Scalable and Secure Cloud Solutions
description: Google Cloud is a fruitful cloud solution that enables users to run and deploy other applications efficiently The tool is designed to handle big data and ensure organization have no storage issues The adoption of machine learning makes the software more intuitive and intelligent
author: Graziana C.
pros: Google Cloud offers remarkable and world class infrastructure that powers other Google services I like the brilliant data analytical capabilities from this software, which improves on business intelligence Google Cloud has robust machine and AI learning capabilities and this improves service delivery
cons: This cloud tool has complex and advanced features that leads to detailed learning process I don’t like the excess documentation that Google Cloud provides, as it is hard to navigate

review_title: A look at Google Cloud from small tutoring company perspective
description: Google Cloud has been used by our business for years. Our company found using Google Cloud seemless with the other Google platforms that we were already using for our daily operations. It is easier to use than other cloud platforms.
author: Mark H.
pros: Google Cloud is great at intergration with other Google applications and services. I also like Google Cloud's easy to use features.
cons: Google Cloud can be more expensive for small businesses to use over long periods of time. It also doesn't work as well with products that are not Google products.

review_title: Great value for money and user experience
description: Very positive. Its great in terms of value for money. Saving data and extracting data is very convenient. Would recommend to my friends.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Its easy to use and very convenient with my gmail account. I can link everything to my account. Plus customer service is very good.
cons: Noting in particular. But it can better with the user interface. A few more customized options could be added for better experience.

review_title: Google Great
description: Google cloud has been the most important with its storage back up and capacity, efficient data storage management capabilities. They appreciate the user-friendly interface, scalability, and capabilities like lifecycle management and versioning.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: most for its strengths in artificial intelligence (AI) and data analytics, its scalability and performance, its user-friendly interface and intuitive design, and its robust global infrastructure and security features. Its deep integration with Google's own data tools like BigQuery and Vertex AI, combined with its ability to handle massive datasets and automate complex processes, empowers businesses to make data-driven decisions quickly and efficiently
cons: I personally dislike the complexity, unpredictable costs, and inadequate customer support associated with Google Cloud. Many also express frustration with a steep learning curve and inconsistent documentation.

review_title: Google Cloud very convenient and easy to use
description: I’ve been using google cloud for well over 5 years, and other than apple iCloud, it’s the only cloud service that I use.
author: Nicholas B.
pros: It’s very convenient. I have every file/photo/, etc, in folders, and can easily search them up, whenever i need one.
cons: They only give you 15GB for free, after that, you have to pay for their subscription plan. They offer 100GB (which is what I use), and they offer a 1 TB plan, as well!

review_title: Google Cloud secured & Value for money
description: Google Cloud overall experience is outstanding
author: Anurag S.
pros: Google Cloud is easy to use,fast & secure.Google cloud is useful platform,its cost of services is lower as compare to others
cons: i feel google cloud at free service some slow when backing datas

review_title: Great for easy data management
author: Faith T.
pros: Google cloud is great, it helps me to manage all of my forms, photos, data files for our PTO. It also contains all of our documents to pass on to the next person.
cons: I struggle with making sure the people that need access have Gmail account accounts and understand how to use the cloud

review_title: Great cloud storage
author: Clay H.
pros: I kiked how compatible google cloud is with everything and the integrations it has with so many other platforms.
cons: There was absolutely nothing wrong with using google cloud. I will continue to use it moving forward.

review_title: Google cloud
description: Great softerware overall, great user interface, great value for money and i will recommend it over and over
author: Yewande O.
pros: Great value for money and helps with access and connectivity, the features are easily understandable, customer support is top notch
cons: The bugs and issues are difficult to detect which often affect ease of use although customer service helps

review_title: Running the back end so the front line supports still run smoothly
description: It just sort of keeps our support tools chugging along without any interruption. It’s made me more responsive, and more confident in my replies, all in all better at my job, as I always have what I need to be that hunting through past tickets, pulling up the policy docs, or checking a customer’s history. That type of predictability is part of what makes frontline support not-so-stressful.
author: Aditya A.
pros: It integrates the apps we use seamlessly behind the scenes things like our CRM, email platform, and shared drives. I don't much think about it directly, but I depend on it every day. It keeps everything quick, from loading customers’ information to retrieving shared resources for support.
cons: Because I don’t run the technical side I sometimes encounter access issues when new folders or tools are introduced. It’s a slow process of untangling permissions, unless IT is snappy. I also would like if there were a more intuitive UI for the less technical to see how everything is stored or linked together.

review_title: Google Cloud is great
description: My overall experience is excellent. Again, as long as I am syncing everything correctly, I can definitely do my job 100% from anywhere.
author: Kimberlee C.
pros: Everything goes to the cloud. I can access it from anywhere. So, if I am unable to access my home computer, I can access my Google Cloud and obtain the documents I need.
cons: The amount of free space. Then you have to pay more for more space. I feel as if I am using a service that it needs to be utilized 100%
